requirements.description: Human intent and machine-verifiable acceptance are stored separately and validated together.
acceptance_steps: Initialize both project files without overwriting existing state.
Reject placeholders, mismatched state, stale resume state, and unsupported passing evidence.
Accept a complete structurally valid active state.

evidence.summary: Eight deterministic tests passed, including dual-file initialization, stale resume rejection, evidence enforcement, blocker recovery, and completion gating.

requirements.description: Failure handling classifies errors before retrying and prevents repeated semantic attempts.
acceptance_steps: The skill distinguishes transient, reasoning-recoverable, user-fixable, and unexpected failures.
A fresh agent refuses an unchanged third attempt after repeated semantic failure.

evidence.summary: Fresh Luna agents reconciled an ambiguous external write and refused an unchanged third semantic retry in favor of authoritative transition tracing.

requirements.description: Delegation occurs only for independent work whose expected contribution exceeds coordination cost.
acceptance_steps: The skill defines a conjunctive delegation admission gate.
Fresh-agent tests keep sequential critical-path work local and allow bounded parallel work.

evidence.summary: A fresh Luna agent kept tightly coupled critical-path diagnosis local, rejected duplicate diagnosis, and delegated only the disjoint read-only acceptance lane.

requirements.description: The public package passes deterministic, behavioral, privacy, and GitHub CI verification.
acceptance_steps: Run the repository test suite and Codex skill validator.
Run privacy scanning and fresh-agent behavioral scenarios.
Push the release and confirm GitHub Actions succeeds.

requirements.description: The exact published release installs locally without duplicating global instructions.
acceptance_steps: Run the public installer twice against an isolated Codex home.
Install locally and compare all installed skill file hashes with the repository.
Confirm one managed global instruction block remains.
